message:
feat(inference): Implement evidence ledger for classification explainability

Implements process_triage-myq: Evidence ledger generation per Plan Section 7.1-7.2.

## Evidence Ledger Module (ledger.rs)
- Classification enum for 4-state model (useful, useful_bad, abandoned, zombie)
- Confidence levels from posterior probabilities (low/medium/high/very_high)
- BayesFactorEntry: per-feature log BF, strength (Jeffreys scale), direction
- EvidenceLedger: sorted Bayes factors, glyph mapping, why_summary
- Supports galaxy-brain mode visualization and 'why' summaries

## Supporting Changes
- Added serde to pt-math for Serialize derives on EvidenceStrength/Direction
- Added ledger exports to inference/mod.rs
- Fixed DecisionOutcome struct usage (recovery_expectations field)

## Tests
- 15 unit tests for ledger functionality
- All 142 pt-core tests pass
- All 174 pt-math tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
